systems.name: Toast
systems.functions: POS, tableside ordering, KDS, payments, payroll, scheduling, inventory, online ordering, loyalty, reporting
systems.notes: Toast has developer docs and APIs for menus, orders, restaurants, locations, configuration, etc.

systems.name: Square for Restaurants
systems.functions: POS, payments, orders, menu/catalog, staff, loyalty, gift cards, online ordering
systems.notes: Strong public API coverage across Orders, Catalog, Payments, Inventory, Customers, Loyalty and Gift Cards.

systems.name: Clover
systems.functions: POS, payments, inventory, orders, employees, app marketplace
systems.notes: Clover REST API supports merchants, inventory, orders, and payments.

systems.name: Lightspeed Restaurant

systems.notes: API access exists, but access may require plan or partner approval.

systems.name: Oracle MICROS Simphony

systems.notes: Oracle Simphony exposes REST APIs and BI APIs for configuration and operational data.

systems.name: NCR Aloha

categories.pinnacleUse: Automate Q&A, phone answering, ordering, forecasts, alerts, and manager recommendations.
Connect COGS, invoices, deposits, payroll, AP, and P&L reporting.
Connect apps quickly with workflows while native API integrations are being built.
Track bar inventory, pours, variance, draft loss, and beverage margins.
Manage leads, BEOs, deposits, production, event orders, and catering profitability.
Capture guest complaints, surveys, dish feedback, recovery actions, and review trends.
Normalize delivery orders and menu sync across multiple delivery apps.
Sync menu data, item availability, pricing, modifiers, and menu board changes.
Manage counts, food cost, waste, invoices, recipes, par levels, and vendor price changes.
Track upsells, self-order conversion, ticket size, and ordering bottlenecks.
Monitor ticket times, kitchen bottlenecks, prep load, and order accuracy.

categories.category: Loyalty / CRM / Gift Cards / Guest Data
categories.pinnacleUse: Track repeat guests, rewards, gift cards, customer lifetime value, and retention.
Track equipment issues, work orders, preventive maintenance, and repair vendors.
Manage reviews, email/SMS campaigns, local SEO, social posts, and promotions.
Pull direct order volume, conversion, menu performance, pickup/delivery demand, and customer data.
Source of truth for sales, orders, menu, payments, taxes, comps, voids, and reporting.
Track deposits, fees, refunds, chargebacks, and payment method mix.
Track hiring pipeline, onboarding, payroll, employee records, and compliance.
Track supplier orders, invoices, price changes, substitutions, and par replenishment.
Create dashboards and owner/manager recaps across sales, labor, inventory, and reviews.
Track covers, pacing, cancellations, VIPs, wait times, and table turn data.
Compare labor hours and cost against sales, weather, events, and forecasts.
Connect POS exceptions to video, reduce theft, and monitor cash/void anomalies.
Run opening/closing checklists, temp logs, audits, food safety, and team accountability.
Track marketplace revenue, fees, order volume, delivery issues, and channel profitability.
Centralize SOPs, onboarding, training progress, and compliance training.

priorities.name: Square
priorities.why: Best public API path for small restaurants; orders, catalog, payments, customers, inventory.

priorities.name: Clover
priorities.why: Strong small restaurant footprint with REST APIs and app marketplace.

priorities.name: Toast
priorities.why: Huge restaurant market; deeper restaurant-native data, but partner access is more involved.
priorities.mvp: Plan early, build after MVP traction

priorities.name: QuickBooks Online
priorities.why: Common back-office target for accounting exports, expenses, bills, deposits, and P&L workflows.
priorities.mvp: Add in MVP or immediately after

priorities.name: 7shifts / Deputy
priorities.why: Labor percent and scheduling are critical for owners/managers.

priorities.name: MarketMan / MarginEdge / Restaurant365
priorities.why: Food cost, invoices, counts, waste, recipes and vendor pricing drive profit.
priorities.mvp: Start with CSV/import, then partner integrations

priorities.name: DoorDash / Uber Eats / Aggregators
priorities.why: Delivery sales, fees and menu sync are major pain points.

priorities.name: Google Business Profile
priorities.why: Reviews and local visibility directly affect sales.

priorities.name: OpenAI API
priorities.why: Turns data into answers, alerts, forecasts, and recommended actions.

priorities.name: Zapier / Make / n8n
priorities.why: Lets restaurants connect more apps without custom native integrations.

functions.tracks: Gross sales, net sales, comps, voids, discounts, taxes, tips, payment types
functions.pinnacleFeature: Daily sales recap with anomalies and month-to-date trends.

functions.tracks: Scheduled hours, actual hours, labor %, overtime, roles, call-outs
functions.pinnacleFeature: Labor vs sales dashboard with overtime and staffing alerts.

functions.tracks: Counts, waste, transfers, invoices, vendor pricing, food cost, par levels
functions.pinnacleFeature: Monthly inventory count sheet with variance and reorder recommendations.

functions.tracks: Purchase orders, vendor orders, delivery status, invoice matching
functions.pinnacleFeature: Vendor order tracker and price-change alerts.

functions.tracks: Item sales, recipe cost, margin, modifiers, 86’d items, menu engineering
Ticket times, prep lists, waste, production, item availability
functions.pinnacleFeature: Kitchen bottleneck and prep planning screen.

functions.tracks: Reservations, waitlist, loyalty, reviews, complaints, VIP notes
functions.pinnacleFeature: Guest profile and complaint recovery tracker.

functions.tracks: Email/SMS campaigns, coupons, reviews, social posts, Google profile
functions.pinnacleFeature: Campaign calendar and review response workflow.

functions.tracks: Temp logs, cleaning logs, HACCP, incident reports, audits
functions.pinnacleFeature: Opening/closing checklists and temperature log compliance.

functions.tracks: COGS, payroll, AP, sales journals, bank deposits, P&L
Daily recap, weekly trends, monthly counts, forecasts, anomalies
functions.pinnacleFeature: AI manager dashboard with questions and alerts.
